Policy / Note: Requirement must list required capabilities and engagement duration
Structured from the client requirement; used to score candidates
Only partners whose specialisations overlap the capability profile are notified
Partners have a defined SLA window to submit candidates
Each candidate must include a capability assessment from the partner
Scored against the capability profile; minimum score required to proceed
Maximum three candidates shortlisted per requirement
Triggered when at least one candidate meets the capability threshold
Presentation may include interview or profile review session
Client selects one candidate from the shortlist
Engagement record created; billing relationship established
